description: Controlled vocabulary of skill categories used across all role data files. Each skill in a role's requiredSkills array must reference one of these categories.

categories.name: Programming Languages
categories.description: General-purpose and domain-specific programming languages for software development, scripting, and automation.

categories.name: Databases
categories.description: Relational and non-relational database systems, query languages, and data modeling.

categories.name: Business Intelligence
categories.description: Data visualization, reporting, and dashboarding tools for business analytics.

categories.name: Data Engineering
categories.description: Data pipeline development, ETL/ELT processes, and data warehousing.

categories.name: Cloud & Infrastructure
categories.description: Cloud platforms, containerization, infrastructure-as-code, and DevOps practices.

categories.name: AI & Machine Learning
categories.description: Machine learning frameworks, deep learning, MLOps, and AI model deployment.

categories.name: Analytics & Statistics
categories.description: Statistical methods, experimental design, quantitative analysis, and data interpretation.

categories.name: Software Development Practices
categories.description: Version control, testing, CI/CD, code review, and agile methodologies.

categories.name: Cybersecurity
categories.description: Information security, network security, risk assessment, and compliance frameworks.

categories.name: Business Tools
categories.description: Productivity and business analysis software used across industries.

categories.name: Professional Communication
categories.description: Written and verbal business communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.

categories.name: Project Management
categories.description: Project planning, execution, delivery methodologies, and team coordination.

categories.name: Design & UX
categories.description: User experience research, interface design, and prototyping.

categories.name: Finance & Accounting
categories.description: Financial analysis, accounting principles, valuation, and regulatory knowledge.

categories.name: Domain Knowledge
categories.description: Industry-specific knowledge required for certain roles, typically learned on the job.

categories.name: Languages
categories.description: Spoken and written language proficiency relevant to the Hong Kong and Greater Bay Area job market.
